_comment: RangeClarity active task tracker. Human view: docs/rangeclarity-active-roadmap.md. Keep simple; no database. Update 'status' by hand: todo | in_progress | blocked | done.
phase: Phase 1 - Activate the Paid/Private Beta loop
week_objective: Get the first 5-10 beta users into RangeClarity and collect feedback within 72h of access.
immediate_next_step: Founder end-to-end dry run in Lemon TEST mode + lock the offer/price in the same sitting.

tasks.title: Founder end-to-end dry run (Lemon TEST)
tasks.why: Proves the loop works for a real human; surfaces friction
tasks.acceptance: register->pay(test)->mark paid->grant->onboard completed; friction list written

tasks.title: Lock beta offer + price; reconcile docs vs page
tasks.why: Top blocker; gates invites, Lemon config, legal copy
tasks.acceptance: one offer chosen ($79/90d or $29); /beta labels + Lemon variant match it

tasks.title: Confirm Lemon TEST mode + amount mapping
tasks.why: Prevents accidental live charges / wrong amounts
tasks.acceptance: checkout in test mode; link maps to decided price; verify amount before marking paid

tasks.title: Publish indicator invite-only; test grant/revoke
tasks.why: No access path = no product delivery
tasks.acceptance: invite-only on TradingView; grant+revoke own test account works

tasks.title: Write manual fulfilment runbook
tasks.acceptance: one doc: buy->verify amount->mark paid in /beta/admin->grant TV->email

tasks.title: Quick indicator confidence pass (~8 charts)
tasks.why: Honest basis to charge; catch repaint/false structure
tasks.acceptance: ~8 charts (1D+4H) read sanely; no repaint surprise on bar-replay; go/no-go noted

tasks.title: Pick + stand up Private Beta Room
tasks.why: Support + feedback channel; part of the offer
tasks.acceptance: Discord/Telegram group created; invite link added to /beta/onboarding

tasks.title: Verify onboarding pages + light paid legal reword
tasks.acceptance: onboarding/TV-access read clean; welcome stub filled; refund+cancellation lines in Terms

tasks.title: Invite first 5-10 warm beta users
tasks.why: The actual goal: real users + money + learning

tasks.title: Run X agent daily (draft) + post 1/day manually
tasks.acceptance: 1 approved post/day from content/x/; status in content/x/status.json; no auto-posting

feedback_loop: Collect feedback 48-72h after each user gets access via /beta/feedback (form + API + store already exist).
blockers: Indicator not formally validated (mitigated by warm invites + RC-6-lite)
Environment-only: sandbox mount corruption + stale .git/index.lock block build/lint/commit here; run locally
decisions_needed: Offer + price: $79/90d (docs) vs $29 or $49/mo (page) - reconcile /beta + Lemon
Lemon: one shared link vs variants; stay test mode until go-live
Beta Room platform: Discord vs Telegram vs Circle
Who are the first 5-10 warm users
How much of the scoring formula to expose (O-007, minor/later)
do_not_do_yet: Landing redesign or new app features
Community platform, durable DB migration, analytics build-out
